input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation says YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON file formats require separate hoplite-* modules, so tests should not rely on those formats unless an extra module is intentionally added later.

Hoplite 3 changes default environment-variable behavior; tests should prefer deterministic sources such as MapPropertySource or built-in .properties resources rather than depending on ambient CI environment variables.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core is usable directly with built-in property sources, MapPropertySource, Java .properties parsing, decoders, preprocessors, and Kotlin reflection; resolved dependencies are already declared by the artifact, and no Docker service or required environment/system property is needed for meaningful core coverage.
